docs.text: Welcome to the IBM Maximo Labs (DIFFERENT from Original Maximo Labs) Demo for Carlos In these hands-on labs you will learn how to get started with the different products that are available in the IBM Maximo portfolio. The labs are in different states of readiness for use shown below. Feel free to open issues and provide us feedback. Tip Using the Search capability in the upper left corner to help you find topics quicker in the labs. Converting to Github Pages Instructions for the migration: Github Pages Lab Converted Present here Maximo Labs Top Level Maximo Labs Top Level Github Pages Maximo Application Suite 8.11 Maximo Monitor Edge Data Collector Maximo Application Suite 8.11 (Under Development) Health, Predict and Utilities Maximo Application Suite 8.10 Monitor Node-RED CSV Importer V2 Maximo Application Suite 8.9 Deploy MAS 8.9 Health, Predict and Utilities Monitor Connect Maximo Application Suite 8.8 Health, Predict and Utilities Monitor Connect Maximo Application Suite 8.7 Health, Predict and Utilities Monitor Asset Hierarchy Maximo Application Suite 8.6 Monitor Node-RED CSV Importer Suite Overview Health and Predict Utilities v8.6 Maximo Application Suite 8.5 Monitor Functions Monitor Auto AI MAS Environmental Monitoring Maximo SaaS (DEPRECATED) Monitor SaaS Visual Inspection (1.3.0) CONTRIBUTE TO MAXIMO LABS Contribute to Labs New Lab Template License See the Copyright page for how the Maximo Hands on Labs are licensed. UPDATED: 2024-01-15

docs.text: Contributors to the IBM Maximo Labs Carlos Ferreira - carlos.ferreira1@ibm.com Jan Ekstrøm - jan.ekstrom@dk.ibm.com Cecilia Stark - cecilia.stark@ibm.com Mike Lamb - mllamb@us.ibm.com Angelina Nicolella - angelina.nicolella@ibm.com Arif Ali - aali@us.ibm.com Juan Gu - gujuan@cn.ibm.com John Douglas Eric Lowry - elowry@us.ibm.com Graeme Pexton - jgpexton@us.ibm.com Change Information Date By Description 2024-01-05 Jan Ekstrøm Restructured to work on Github Pages. 2023-12-29 Jan Ekstrøm Updated the contribute and template labs. 2023-10-30 Jan Ekstrøm Removed deprecated Universal Analytics. 2023-09-25 Jan Ekstrøm Added the Maximo Monitor Edge Data Collector Lab. 2023-03-24 Mike Lamb & Jan Ekstrøm Added Monitor Node-RED CSV Importer Lab V2.0 2022-10-18 Jan Ekstrøm Updated Monitor-Omnio Integration Lab and the Maximo Lab landing page. 2022-09-23 Jan Ekstrøm Added the Monitor-Omnio Integration Lab. 2022-02-26 Cecilia Stark MAS v8.6 Suite Overview Lab. 2022-02-22 Jan Ekstrøm Added the Monitor Node-RED CSV Importer lab. 2022-02-18 Carlos Ferreira Added the MAS 8.7 APM lab. 2021-03-16 Cecilia Stark Updated the status of Fast Start 2021 Labs. 2021-01-29 Mike Lamb & Carlos Ferreira Added updates to Monitor SaaS for Anomaly Detection lab. 2021-01-05 Jan Ekstrøm Migration to new IBM Maximo Labs is complete. OLD-REPO is purged. 2021-01-05 Jan Ekstrøm Added an Additional MkDocs Sub-sites section to provide direct liks to Contribute and Template. 2021-01-05 Jan Ekstrøm Added IBM Maximo Visual Inspection (8.2) to the list of Under development labs in the MAS 8.2 section. 2021-01-05 Carlos Ferreira Added IBM Maximo Monitor, Health & Predict (FS21) to the list of Under development labs in the Faststart 2021 section section. 2021-01-05 Jan Ekstrøm Added IBM Maximo Visual Inspection (1.3.0) to the list of Ready to use labs in the SaaS section. 2021-01-04 Jan Ekstrøm Merged contributors into one About page and added change information as well. Added Last Update at the end of the Index file. Implemented that on all sub-sites. 2020-12-30 Jan Ekstrøm Migrated original site to toplevel and created the new structure for the IBM Maximo Labs
docs.title: Release Notes
